name: direct_left_recursion_compiles
description: Direct left recursion (A <- A 'a') compiles when LR is enabled

name: left_recursive_with_option_compiles
description: Indirect LR through optional rule compiles

name: left_recursive_with_zom_compiles
description: LR with zero-or-more compiles (A <- 'a'* A*)

name: left_recursive_with_zom_content_rule_compiles
description: LR through a chain with a zero-or-more content rule compiles

name: indirect_left_recursion
description: Indirect left recursion through three rules
grammar:
A <- B 'a'
B <- C 'b'
C <- A 'c' / 'd'

name: complex_indirect_left_recursion
description: Complex indirect LR through a long chain
grammar:
A <- B / C 'a'
B <- D 'b'
C <- E 'c'
D <- A 'd'
E <- F 'e'
F <- G 'f'
G <- A 'g' / 'h'

name: mutual_left_recursion
description: Mutual left recursion between two rules

name: hidden_left_recursion_with_epsilon
description: LR hidden behind an optional (nullable) rule

name: deep_indirect_epsilon
description: LR through a chain of rules with a nullable prefix
grammar:
A <- B
B <- C
C <- D? A / 'x'
D <- 'x'

name: predicate_epsilon
description: And-predicate is always nullable (does not consume)

name: complex_choice_epsilon
description: Empty string rule makes D? A a nullable prefix

name: complex_sequence_epsilon
description: Multiple nullable prefixes before the recursive reference

name: cross_reference_epsilon
description: Nullable through a chain of nullable rules; PEG ordered choice picks first match
grammar:
A <- B A / 'a'
B <- C / D
C <- E
D <- F
E <- 'e'?
F <- 'f'*

name: pure_epsilon_left_recursion
description: A <- A / '' — most dangerous pattern, should not hang

name: direct_left_recursion_no_alternatives
description: A <- A — no base case, can never match

name: mutual_recursion_with_epsilon
description: Mutual recursion with epsilon alternative

name: diamond_dependency_epsilon
description: Both B and C reference A through nullable D — no base case
grammar:
A <- B / C
B <- D A 'b'
C <- D A 'c'
D <- 'x'?

name: class_epsilon
description: Nullable character class before recursive reference

name: epsilon_with_complex_predicate
description: And-predicate and not-predicate with nullable rules

name: arithmetic_expressions
description: Left-recursive arithmetic with semantic evaluation via choice_op
grammar:
expr <- expr '+' term / expr '-' term / term
term <- term '*' factor / term '/' factor / factor
factor <- '(' expr ')' / number
number <- < [0-9]+ >
%whitespace <- [ \t]*

name: arithmetic_expressions_with_ast
description: Left-recursive arithmetic AST structure after optimization
grammar:
expr <- expr '+' term / expr '-' term / term
term <- term '*' factor / term '/' factor / factor
factor <- '(' expr ')' / number
number <- < [0-9]+ >
%whitespace <- [ \t]*

cases.expected_ast:
+ expr/0
  + expr/1
    + expr/0
      - expr/2[number] (1)
      + term/0
        - term/2[number] (2)
        - factor/1[number] (3)
    + term/0
      - term/2[number] (4)
      - factor/1[number] (5)
  + term/1
    - term/2[number] (6)
    - factor/1[number] (2)

name: left_recursion_disabled
description: Left-recursive grammar should fail to compile when LR is disabled
grammar:
expr <- expr '+' term / expr '-' term / term
term <- term '*' factor / term '/' factor / factor
factor <- '(' expr ')' / number
number <- < [0-9]+ >
%whitespace <- [ \t]*

name: lr_detection_disabled_direct
description: Direct LR detected as error when LR is disabled

name: lr_detection_disabled_option
description: Indirect LR through option detected when LR is disabled

name: lr_detection_disabled_zom
description: LR through zero-or-more detected when LR is disabled

name: lr_detection_disabled_zom_content
description: LR through chain with ZOM content detected when LR is disabled

name: lr_detection_disabled_empty_string
description: LR through empty string detected when LR is disabled

name: monkey_language_precedence
description: Monkey language grammar using precedence climbing
grammar:
PROGRAM <- STATEMENTS

STATEMENTS <- (STATEMENT ';'?)*
STATEMENT <- ASSIGNMENT / RETURN / EXPRESSION_STATEMENT

ASSIGNMENT <- 'let' IDENTIFIER '=' EXPRESSION
RETURN <- 'return' EXPRESSION
EXPRESSION_STATEMENT <- EXPRESSION

EXPRESSION <- INFIX_EXPR(PREFIX_EXPR, INFIX_OPE)
INFIX_EXPR(ATOM, OPE) <- ATOM (OPE ATOM)* {
  precedence
    L == !=
    L < >
    L + -
    L * /
}

IF <- 'if' '(' EXPRESSION ')' BLOCK ('else' BLOCK)?

FUNCTION <- 'fn' '(' PARAMETERS ')' BLOCK
PARAMETERS <- LIST(IDENTIFIER, ',')

BLOCK <- '{' STATEMENTS '}'

CALL <- PRIMARY (ARGUMENTS / INDEX)*
ARGUMENTS <- '(' LIST(EXPRESSION, ',') ')'
INDEX <- '[' EXPRESSION ']'

PREFIX_EXPR <- PREFIX_OPE* CALL
PRIMARY <- IF / FUNCTION / ARRAY / HASH / INTEGER / BOOLEAN / NULL / IDENTIFIER / STRING / '(' EXPRESSION ')'

ARRAY <- '[' LIST(EXPRESSION, ',') ']'

HASH <- '{' LIST(HASH_PAIR, ',') '}'
HASH_PAIR <- EXPRESSION ':' EXPRESSION

IDENTIFIER <- < [a-zA-Z]+ >
INTEGER <- < [0-9]+ >
STRING <- < ["] < (!["] .)* > ["] >
BOOLEAN <- 'true' / 'false'
NULL <- 'null'
PREFIX_OPE <- < [-!] >
INFIX_OPE <- < [-+/*<>] / '==' / '!=' >

KEYWORD <- 'null' | 'true' | 'false' | 'let' | 'return' | 'if' | 'else' | 'fn'

LIST(ITEM, DELM) <- (ITEM (~DELM ITEM)*)?

LINE_COMMENT <- '//' (!LINE_END .)* &LINE_END
LINE_END <- '\r\n' / '\r' / '\n' / !.

%whitespace <- ([ \t\r\n]+ / LINE_COMMENT)*
%word <- [a-zA-Z]+

name: monkey_language_left_recursion
description: Monkey language grammar using left recursion for operator precedence
grammar:
PROGRAM <- STATEMENTS

STATEMENTS <- (STATEMENT ';'?)*
STATEMENT <- ASSIGNMENT / RETURN / EXPRESSION_STATEMENT

ASSIGNMENT <- 'let' IDENTIFIER '=' EXPRESSION
RETURN <- 'return' EXPRESSION
EXPRESSION_STATEMENT <- EXPRESSION

EXPRESSION <- logical_expr
logical_expr <- logical_expr logical_op equality_expr / equality_expr
equality_expr <- equality_expr equality_op comparison_expr / comparison_expr
comparison_expr <- comparison_expr comparison_op additive_expr / additive_expr
additive_expr <- additive_expr additive_op multiplicative_expr / multiplicative_expr
multiplicative_expr <- multiplicative_expr multiplicative_op prefix_expr / prefix_expr
prefix_expr <- PREFIX_OPE* postfix_expr
postfix_expr <- postfix_expr (ARGUMENTS / INDEX) / primary_expr
primary_expr <- IF / FUNCTION / ARRAY / HASH / INTEGER / BOOLEAN / NULL / IDENTIFIER / STRING / '(' EXPRESSION ')'

logical_op <- '&&' / '||'
equality_op <- '==' / '!='
comparison_op <- '<=' / '>=' / '<' / '>'
additive_op <- '+' / '-'
multiplicative_op <- '*' / '/'

IF <- 'if' '(' EXPRESSION ')' BLOCK ('else' BLOCK)?

FUNCTION <- 'fn' '(' PARAMETERS ')' BLOCK
PARAMETERS <- LIST(IDENTIFIER, ',')

BLOCK <- '{' STATEMENTS '}'

ARGUMENTS <- '(' LIST(EXPRESSION, ',') ')'
INDEX <- '[' EXPRESSION ']'

ARRAY <- '[' LIST(EXPRESSION, ',') ']'

HASH <- '{' LIST(HASH_PAIR, ',') '}'
HASH_PAIR <- EXPRESSION ':' EXPRESSION

IDENTIFIER <- !KEYWORD < [a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]* >
INTEGER <- < [0-9]+ >
STRING <- < ["] (!["] .)* ["] >
BOOLEAN <- 'true' / 'false'
NULL <- 'null'
PREFIX_OPE <- < [-!] >

KEYWORD <- 'null' / 'true' / 'false' / 'let' / 'return' / 'if' / 'else' / 'fn'

LIST(ITEM, DELM) <- (ITEM (~DELM ITEM)*)?

LINE_COMMENT <- '//' (!LINE_END .)* &LINE_END
LINE_END <- '\r\n' / '\r' / '\n' / !.

%whitespace <- ([ \t\r\n]+ / LINE_COMMENT)*
%word <- [a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*

name: right_recursive_regression
description: Right-recursive grammar should not break with LR enabled
grammar:
Expression <- Term ('+' / '-') Expression / Term
Term <- Factor ('*' / '/') Term / Factor
Factor <- '(' Expression ')' / Number
Number <- < [0-9]+ >
%whitespace <- [ \t]*

name: typescript_types_realistic
description: TypeScript-like type grammar with left recursion
grammar:
Type <- UnionType / IntersectionType / PrimaryType
UnionType <- UnionType '|' IntersectionType / IntersectionType
IntersectionType <- IntersectionType '&' PrimaryType / PrimaryType
PrimaryType <- BasicType / ObjectType / FunctionType / '(' Type ')'
ObjectType <- '{' PropertyList '}'
PropertyList <- Property (',' Property)* / ''
Property <- Identifier ':' Type
FunctionType <- '(' ParameterList ')' '=>' Type
ParameterList <- Type (',' Type)* / ''
BasicType <- 'string' / 'number' / 'boolean'
Identifier <- < [a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9]* >
%whitespace <- [ \t]*

name: packrat_with_left_recursion
description: Packrat caching works correctly with left-recursive grammars (with semantic evaluation)
grammar:
expr <- expr '+' term / expr '-' term / term
term <- term '*' factor / term '/' factor / factor
factor <- '(' expr ')' / number
number <- < [0-9]+ >
%whitespace <- [ \t]*
